Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember winning a prize[n]from this crane game.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wasn't sure it was possible to grab a prize,[n]but I guess they're an above board arcade...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've never won a prize[n]from this crane game.[n]{f 1 1}
